subcodes.first_line: O Son of 'Attar! Praise be unto God that thou art perfumed by the fragrant breezes of the verses of the Desire of all worlds, and thy mention is in most times [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن عطار الحمد لله از نفحات آیات مقصود عالمیان معطری ذکرت در اکثر احیان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @call to action, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
